raw.subject: Your Reno page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Finding out that you have a reflexology place nearby to where you live is always exciting! I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for new customers to find you.

I sketched a page idea that could showcase your services, such as a services menu for couple massages and a work gallery to highlight your expertise.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/indulge-massage-reflexology-reno

Would you be open to discussing how a simple website can help your business grow? I work with local businesses on a flat fee basis, and I'd love to chat with you about it.
